name: Peter Pan Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking dish with sunflower oil.
In a blender, combine peanut butter, oil, thyme, tarragon, salt, and 2 ounces water.
Blend until the mixture achieves sauce consistency.
Combine the sauce with rice, sunflower seeds, and shallots. Mix well.
Transfer to the baking dish and bake for 20 minutes in the oven.
